items.title: GPT-5.6
items.title_en: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.6, Achieves ARC-AGI-3 SOTA
items.summary: OpenAI releases GPT-5.6, a new frontier model achieving SOTA on ARC-AGI-3 with improved intent understanding and image processing.

items.title: EU Parliament greenlights Chat Control 1.0
items.title_zh: 欧盟议会通过程序性手段批准聊天控制1.0
items.title_en: EU Parliament Approves Chat Control 1.0 Through Procedural Trick
items.summary: EU Parliament greenlights Chat Control 1.0, allowing mass scanning of private messages, despite majority opposition, due to a parliamentary trick.

items.title: Postgres rewritten in Rust, now passing 100% of the Postgres regression tests
items.title_en: Postgres rewritten in Rust passes all tests
items.summary: A project rewriting PostgreSQL in Rust using LLMs now passes 100% of regression tests, sparking substantial community discussion.

items.title: TypeScript 7.0 正式发布：Go 重写带来最高 12 倍速度提升
items.title_zh: TypeScript 7.0 发布：Go 重写带来最高 12 倍速度提升
items.title_en: TypeScript 7.0 Released with Go Rewrite, Up to 12x Faster
items.summary: TypeScript 7.0 is released with a Go rewrite delivering up to 12x faster builds, supporting parallelization and a new language server.

items.title: Hy3
items.title_zh: 腾讯发布Hy3，一个能力强的小型AI模型
items.title_en: Tencent Releases Hy3, a Capable Small AI Model
items.summary: Tencent releases Hy3, a small yet capable AI model that has generated buzz with free offers on OpenRouter, but faces competition from similar models.

items.title: Muse Spark 1.1
items.title_zh: Meta发布Muse Spark 1.1，具备AI代理能力
items.title_en: Meta Releases Muse Spark 1.1 with Agentic AI
items.summary: Meta releases Muse Spark 1.1, a new AI model with agentic capabilities, sparking discussion on evaluation methods and open-weight strategy.

items.title: GLM 5.2 is nearly as accurate as a human book keeper
items.title_zh: GLM 5.2在增值税对账中接近人类水平
items.title_en: GLM 5.2 Nears Human Accuracy in VAT Reconciliation
items.summary: GLM 5.2 achieves near-human accuracy on VAT reconciliation tasks but the benchmark ignores the broader scope of bookkeeping and raises unresolved liability issues.

items.title: Rewriting Bun in Rust
items.title_zh: Bun 从 Zig 重写为 Rust
items.title_en: Bun Rewritten from Zig to Rust via AI Agents
items.summary: Jarred Sumner details the decision and process of rewriting Bun from Zig to Rust, citing memory management issues and stability improvements.

items.title: Introducing GPT‑Live
items.title_zh: OpenAI推出GPT-Live，语音模式可委托给GPT-5.5
items.title_en: OpenAI introduces GPT-Live with GPT-5.5 delegation for voice mode
items.summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-Live, upgrading ChatGPT voice mode with a new model that can delegate complex tasks to GPT-5.5.

items.title: The Future of Meta Superintelligence: A 1 Year Progress Update
items.title_zh: Meta 超级智能一年进展更新
items.summary: Meta's superintelligence initiative progresses aggressively with unprecedented compute scaling and new reinforcement learning capabilities.

items.title: 蚂蚁灵波开源 LingBot-Video，全球首个 MoE 具身视频基模
items.title_zh: 蚂蚁灵波开源 LingBot-Video，全球首个 MoE 具身视频基模
items.summary: Ant Group open-sources LingBot-Video, the first MoE embodied video foundation model with 30B parameters (3B active), outperforming prior models on robot video benchmarks.

items.title: 🤖 OpenAI 与美国战争部拟修订合同，强调 AI 不得用于监控本国公民  OpenAI 与美国战争部（原“国防部”）已达成一致，拟在双方的 AI 合作协议中
items.title_zh: OpenAI与美国防部拟禁止AI用于公民监控
items.title_en: OpenAI and US DoD to Ban AI for Citizen Surveillance
items.summary: OpenAI and the US Department of Defense agreed to revise their contract to explicitly prohibit AI use for domestic surveillance of American citizens.
